analysis.consistency: Consistent. The data structure matches the expected format for a D&D 5e spell entry.
analysis.quality: High. All required fields are present, logically structured, and the descriptive text is complete, including the scaling mechanic.

mechanics.name: Magic Missile
mechanics.target_limit: Up to 3 distinct targets (or fewer, chosen by caster)
mechanics.notes: This spell is highly reliable due to its guaranteed hits and scalability. Damage calculation for base slot: 3 darts * (1d4 + 1 average damage per dart) = 3d4 + 3 total damage, assuming all darts hit the minimum average value.
